criteria.label: Name three Claude strength areas with one sentence each.
criteria.example: Long-form writing, code explanation, document summarization within context limits.

criteria.label: Give one prompt tactic that amplifies a strength on a real task.
criteria.example: For a long doc: 'First outline sections, then summarize section 3 only in a table.'

criteria.label: Explain why strengths are not guarantees.
criteria.example: Models are probabilistic—same prompt can vary; I verify facts and run code tests.

criteria.label: Match a task to the appropriate model tier and access path.
criteria.example: Quick email polish → Sonnet or Haiku via claude.ai. Multi-file refactor with repo context → Claude Code or API with capable tier.
